creator: pauamma@gundo.com
text: I installed games/anki from pkg (probably sometime between when 12.1-RC2 came out and the release of 12.1 itself), and some time thereafter, I started getting a "pkg: anki has a missing dependency: lame" message. I think this means that at some point lame (as a package) disappeared from under anki. More information available upon request.
